title: PalProtector
description: This simple plugin makes sure your tamed wolves don't get hurt from falls and also stops you from accidentally hurting your furry friend.
body:
# About
Protect your cherished companions with the PalProtector! Venturing through the expansive world of Minecraft, it's not uncommon for our beloved pets to encounter dangers that we never intended for them. Due to accidental falls our furry friends can quickly find themselves in harm's way.

The PalProtector Plugin has been crafted to ensure your pets remain safe from such unintended dangers.

# Why?
Tamed dogs often have less than ideal path finding and often fall off ledges. This plugin simply disabled fall damage for pets, specifically tamed wolfs. 

# Features include:
- Fall Damage Prevention: No more heartbreak from high jumps or slippery cliffs. Your pets will land safely every time.
- Owner Damage Shield: Accidentally swung your pickaxe or sword? With PalProtector, your pets won't bear the brunt.

I made this Plugin because I couldn't find one that stops dogs from getting hurt from falls. It's my first try at coding for Minecraft! 

# Contact
Discord: meltedbutter77
